# link11waap_acl_profiles (Data Source)

Lists all ACL profiles in a configuration.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Example: ACL Profiles Data Source

data "link11waap_config" "main" {}

data "link11waap_acl_profiles" "all" {
  config_id = data.link11waap_config.main.id
}

output "acl_profiles" {
  value = data.link11waap_acl_profiles.all.acl_profiles
}

output "acl_profile_names" {
  value = [for acl in data.link11waap_acl_profiles.all.acl_profiles : acl.name]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `config_id` (String) Configuration ID.

### Read-Only

- `acl_profiles` (Attributes List) List of ACL profiles. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--acl_profiles))

<a id="nestedatt--acl_profiles"></a>
### Nested Schema for `acl_profiles`

Read-Only:

- `action` (String)
- `allow` (List of String)
- `allow_bot` (List of String)
- `deny` (List of String)
- `deny_bot` (List of String)
- `description` (String)
- `force_deny` (List of String)
- `id` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `passthrough` (List of String)
- `tags` (List of String)
